2322860.name: Acorn Hunt
2322860.description:
Step into the shoes of Skylar Squirrel, tasked with returning the missing acorn back home across a variety of levels. With increasing level sizes and complexity, race to beat other players best times on the Steam Leaderboards.

Take the acorn from it's tree stump, navigate the obstacles, and return the acorn back home in the fastest time you can! The puzzles couldn't seem more simple, but is there more to them?

Take on solo mode which offers 20 challenges to teach you the game and test your speed!

You will see new time trial levels released seasonally, giving you new and exciting challenges to face. Will you get your name forever engraved in the leaderboard history?

Or take to multiplayer, where you can compete head on against your friends in a competitive race!

With plenty of modes to play and new levels planned to be released periodically, with visual updates typically arriving every few months, this little puzzle game will have you competitively looking for acorns in no time!
2322860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
